labels.name: pitchiq_v1_booking_book_guest_slot
labels.description: Book a confirmed guest slot on a PitchIQ host's PUBLIC booking calendar (Calendly-style). Outcome-priced — you pay per confirmed booking. Re-checks slot availability, sends the confirmation email, and pushes to the host's Google Calendar when connected. Find bookable hosts via discover_search_podcas

labels.name: pitchiq_v1_commerce_quote_action
labels.description: Get a firm x402 price + payment requirements for any Commerce tool BEFORE committing — so an agent (or its spend policy) can budget. Returns the USD price, pricing class, network, and the x402 'accepts' block to construct the payment. x402-payable (read class).

labels.name: pitchiq_v1_brain_search
labels.description: Semantic search across the active workspace's wiki (the 'brain'). Finds pages by MEANING — it matches even when you use different words than the page does. Returns ranked pages (title, slug, summary). Prefer this over pitchiq_v1_wiki_search_pages when you don't know the exact wording. Requires an ac

labels.name: pitchiq_v1_brain_get_index
labels.description: Return the workspace 'brain index' — every wiki page's title, slug, and one-line summary, in hierarchy order. Call this at the START of a session to learn what the workspace already knows before searching, asking the user, or creating anything. Requires an active workspace.

labels.name: pitchiq_v1_brain_graph_query
labels.description: Traverse the workspace knowledge graph from a specific entity. For wiki_page: returns forward links, backlinks, 5 most similar pages, and CRM entity mentions found in the page text. For contact: returns linked deals, opportunities, tasks, outreach summary, conversation count, and wiki pages mentioni

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: pitchiq_v1_discover_search_curators, pitchiq_v1_discover_search_creators · Private data: pitchiq_v1_brain_graph_query · Public sink: pitchiq_v1_booking_book_guest_slot, pitchiq_v1_brain_graph_query.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: pitchiq_v1_discover_search_curators, pitchiq_v1_discover_search_creators · Private data: pitchiq_v1_brain_graph_query · Public sink: pitchiq_v1_booking_book_guest_slot, pitchiq_v1_brain_graph_query

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
